name: Refund on Exportation of Unmerchantable Imported Liquors

eligibility.description: Importers must return the goods to customs custody for exportation or destruction after finding they do not conform to samples or specifications.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a full refund, remission, or credit of internal revenue taxes paid on imported distilled spirits, wines, or beer that are found to be unmerchantable or non-conforming and are subsequently exported or destroyed.
